mapper.select: SELECT * FROM game_rule WHERE rule_type = 1 AND is_default = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update:
DELETE FROM game_rule WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND rule_type = 2
INSERT INTO game_rule ( rule_key, rule_name, rule_value, rule_type, room_id, is_default, status, description, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{rule.ruleKey}, #{rule.ruleName}, #{rule.ruleValue}, 2, #{roomId}, #{rule.isDefault}, #{rule.status}, #{rule.description}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_rule ( rule_key, rule_name, rule_value, rule_type, room_id, is_default, status, description, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{ruleKey}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleValue}, #{ruleType}, #{roomId}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW() )
